name: Ratnapark → Kalanki
description: Major east-west corridor connecting Ratnapark to Kalanki through Tripureshwor and Kalimati.

name: Ratnapark → Koteshwor
description: Runs east from Ratnapark through Baneshwor to Koteshwor, a major junction in the city.

name: Ratnapark → Bhaktapur
description: Long-distance route from Ratnapark heading east through Koteshwor, Jadibuti, and Suryabinayak to Bhaktapur Durbar Square area.
